metadata.note: Archetype A (target-centric): primary_target=ASIA-NORKOREA, participants {NORKOREA, CHINA}. The China NAME is the discriminator, not a country-name violation: the centroid gate resolves the DPRK (the subject), so 'China' is what separates this axis from north_korea_russia_alignment. Generic domain verbs (trade, flights, oil, summit) deliberately EXCLUDED -- aliases are OR'd, so a bare verb would match every DPRK trade/summit title and leak straight into the Russia atomic. Xi Jinping and Wang Yi are own-side principals here (Pillar 1), not third-party leaders. ru 'Ван И' EXCLUDED: substring of Иван Иванович.
metadata.sanctions_evasion: China-specific non-enforcement vocabulary (ship-to-ship, coal, seafood, labourers) lives here rather than on the missile atomic, per the approved structure. Lazarus/crypto dropped entirely: 4 titles, not worth a leak-prone alias.

bundle.term: China (the discriminating name) and its principals
